index.html:
Our Love Story | 2026
💕

OUR LOVE STORY

“Written by Destiny, Directed by Heart”

This Valentine, I celebrate Us ❤️
🌹

Ek Din Sab Kuch Badal Gaya…

“Us din mujhe nahi pata tha ke meri zindagi hamesha ke liye badalne wali hai… Ek simple si mulaqat, ek simple si smile… Aur dil ne chupke se faisla kar liya.”

💫

Jab Hum Pehli Baar Mile

“Woh pehli nazar… Woh halki si awkward smile… Aur meri dhadkan ka fast ho jana.”

💬

Pehli Baat

“Ek ‘Hi’ se shuru hui baat… Aur pata hi nahi chala kab ‘Goodnight’ ka intezar hone laga.”

❤️

Shayad Yehi Pyaar Hai…

“Jab tumhari awaaz se sukoon milne lage… Jab tumhari fikr apni fikr se zyada hone lage… Tab samajh aata hai… Ye sirf pasand nahi… pyaar hai.”

🎁

Our First Special Moment

“Woh din chhota tha… Magar meri yaadon mein hamesha ke liye bas gaya.”

😅

Har Kahani Perfect Nahi Hoti

“Haan, hum lade bhi… Par har ladai ne hume aur kareeb la diya. Kyuki door rehna hum dono ko pasand nahi.”

🥺

Sorry & Hug

“Ek ‘Sorry’ ne sab theek kar diya… Aur ek hug ne dil phir se jod diya.”

💖

Tumhari Smile

“Tumhari smile meri duniya roshan kar deti hai.”

💞

Tumhara Care

“Tumhara ‘khana kha liya?’ Mere liye duniya ka sabse pyara sawaal hai.”

🌍

Tumhara Support

“Jab sab saath chhod dein… Tumhara ‘Main hoon na’ sab kuch theek kar deta hai.”

🌙

3 AM Conversations

“Duniya so rahi hoti hai… Aur hum apni choti si duniya mein khoye hote hain.”

💭

Humara Kal

“Ek din hum saath travel karenge… Ek din hum apna ghar banayenge… Ek din hum rocking chair par baith kar apni kahani yaad karenge.”

💌

A Letter To You

“Dear Love, Agar zindagi ek kitaab hai… Toh main chahta hoon har chapter tumhare saath likhun. Har khushi, har gham… sirf tumhare saath.”

🎬

Because…

“Tum meri aadat nahi… Tum meri zarurat ho. Tum mera waqt nahi… Tum meri zindagi ho.”

💍

My Question…

Will You Be My Forever Valentine?

🌹

To Be Continued…

“Our Love Story is not ending… It’s just getting started.”

Forever & Always
